task_params.title: Power Electronics Keynote Outline
example_points: Add EV fast-charger thermal derating case from municipal fleet retrofit
Add inverter reliability lesson from capacitor ripple-current redesign
Add IoT remote monitoring example that caught field voltage imbalance early
Emphasize compliance tradeoff between UL margins and deployment schedule
